sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79493" key="paretoima/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρετοιμ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n79493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make ready besides</tr_>, metrical version of <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62</biblScope> </bibl> (Chambry <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> P.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:300" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">300</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
